---
name: ✨ Feature Request
description: Suggest an idea for Danny AI OS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? Is this related to an issue?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like in detail.

## Alternative Approaches

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Implementation Considerations

- How would this fit into the current architecture?
- Would this require changes to existing agents or policies?
- Any performance implications?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] This is not a duplicate feature request
- [ ] I have read the project goals
